description: You are a Computer and Information Systems Manager at a defense contractor. Your compliance team has requested that Rocket.Chat's profanity/bad words filter be enabled and configured with organization-specific restricted terms to prevent accidental data classification leaks in informal chat. Log in to http://localhost:3000 using username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Enable the bad words filter and add the following terms to the restricted list: classified, confidential, proprietary, restricted. After saving the configuration, verify the filter is active by posting a test message containing the word 'classified' in the #general channel.
